dag.dag_name: Store Sales nightly rollup DAG-level scheduler congestion

tasks.dependencies: Fetches the Inventory entity list (stores/zones/segments/vendors) to fan out over
One mapped instance per entity, bound to a dedicated Airflow pool
Runs in parallel with process_unit, watches shared pool capacity
Fan-in of all mapped instances plus the monitor
Evaluates whether queue congestion impacted this or sibling DAGs

incident.incident_name: Store Sales nightly rollup DAG-level scheduler congestion
incident.description: Queue Congestion incident on the Inventory pipeline (RTL_INV_QUEUE): store Sales nightly rollup DAG-level scheduler congestion.
incident.symptoms: 450 per-store rollup tasks, generated dynamically, overwhelmed the Airflow scheduler's parsing and scheduling loop itself, not just the executor.
incident.root_cause: The scheduler's parsing loop performance degrades non-linearly with very high per-DAG-run task counts when using classic (non-deferred) dynamic task mapping without batching, causing scheduler heartbeat delays across the entire Airflow instance.
incident.business_impact: Scheduler-wide latency degraded briefly, causing minor scheduling delays on unrelated DAGs across the platform during the incident window.
incident.resolution: Batch stores into groups of 25 (18 mapped tasks each handling 25 stores) instead of 450 individual mapped tasks, reducing scheduler overhead while retaining parallelism.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: The scheduler's parsing loop performance degrades non-linearly with very high per-DAG-run task counts when using classic (non-deferred) dynamic task mapping without batching, causing scheduler heartbeat delays across the entire Airflow instance.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow scheduler logs show elevated DAG-parsing loop duration correlated with this DAG's scheduled run time
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog airflow.scheduler.heartbeat_latency spiked platform-wide during the rollup DAG's peak task-generation moment
expected_rca.resolution: Batch stores into groups of 25 (18 mapped tasks each handling 25 stores) instead of 450 individual mapped tasks, reducing scheduler overhead while retaining parallelism.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add a 'max recommended mapped-task cardinality per DAG-run' guideline to the DAG factory template, with batching logic auto-applied above a threshold (e.g., 100).
